zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN於1305年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德波格斯時，她的父親Waleran De Luxembourg II35歲，母親Giuota de Chatelain11歲。她和Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1358年享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: STRAETEN
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Stratton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Stratton or Stretton, almost all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, Roman road’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. Stratton in Cornwall, which may also be a partial source of the surname, probably has as its first element Cornish stras ‘valley’.

English: variant of Sturton, a habitational name from Sturton le Steeple (Nottinghamshire), Great Sturton (Lincolnshire), Sturton by Stow (Lincolnshire), or possibly Sturton (Northumberland), all of which placenames share the same etymology and early spellings as 1 above.

Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘street, Roman road’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN was born in 1305, in Bergues, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Waleran De Luxembourg II, was 35 and her mother, Giuota de Chatelain, was 11. She had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles. She died in 1358, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN est née en 1305, à Bergues, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Waleran De Luxembourg II, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Giuota de Chatelain, avait 11 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles. Elle est décédée en 1358, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN 1305 in Bergues, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Waleran De Luxembourg II 35 und ihre Mutter Giuota de Chatelain 11. Sie hatte mit Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1358 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN è nata il nel 1305 nel Bergues, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Waleran De Luxembourg II, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Giuota de Chatelain, aveva 11 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles. Morì nel 1358, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETENが1305年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードバーグスで生まれた時，父Waleran De Luxembourg IIは35歳，母Giuota de Chatelainは11歳であった。彼女はChevalier Jean De Ghistellesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1358年に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN(이)가 1305년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 버구스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Waleran De Luxembourg II(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Giuota de Chatelain(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1358년 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN nasceu em 1305, em Bergues, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Waleran De Luxembourg II, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Giuota de Chatelain, tinha 11 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles. Ela faleceu em 1358, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN родилась в 1305 г. в местности биргуесь, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Waleran De Luxembourg II было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Giuota de Chatelain, 11. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles. Она умерла в 1358 г. в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN nació en 1305, en Bergues, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Waleran De Luxembourg II, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Giuota de Chatelain, tenía 11 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles. Murió en 1358, a la edad de 53 años.
